description: Enable the beep/sound notification in bcWebCam so that an audible beep plays each time a barcode or QR code is successfully scanned. Open bcWebCam's settings or options dialog (typically accessible via a menu, toolbar button, or right-click context menu), locate the sound/beep notification setting, enable it, and apply or confirm the settings change. Finally, save a screenshot of the settings dialog showing the beep sound is enabled to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\beep_enabled_proof.png'.
